headline: Palo Alto Networks Expands Siemens 5G Alliance To Secure AI Factories
summary: Palo Alto Networks announced new cybersecurity partnerships and a verified industrial 5G solution with Siemens in the past week. The Siemens collaboration targets private 5G industrial networks, aiming to meet strict industry requirements while defending manufacturers against cyber threats. At Mobile World Congress, the company also revealed alliances with Nokia, U Mobile, Aeris, and Celerway to secure AI factories and 5G or IoT edge infrastructures. Palo Alto Networks, listed as...
